settings.label: Shipping charges
settings.intl_note: Exact availability & rates appear at checkout.

settings.label: Key takeaways
settings.item1: Estimated delivery is shown on the cart/checkout pages.
settings.item2: Customs/duties (if applicable) are paid by the customer unless collected at checkout.
settings.item3: Delays can happen due to courier, weather, or operational issues.

settings.content:
Main policy

📦 Delivery & packaging

  • Processing time varies by product.
  • Your order ships together when all items are ready.
  • Orders are packed securely in sealed, discreet packaging.

💰 Cash on Delivery (COD) Orders

  • Refunds for COD orders will only be issued as Lagorii Wallet credits (not to bank/UPI).
  • A flat ₹100/- per COD order will be applied as processing and handling fees. ( Which non- refundable )
  • Wallet credits are added within 48 hours of successful quality check and do not expire.

settings.c1:
• International shipping is available; rates and timelines appear at checkout.
  • Delivery timelines may increase due to customs processing in the destination country.
  • Customs fees, local taxes, and courier processing charges may apply and are the customer’s responsibility unless mentioned at checkout.
  • Parcels are sent as “signature not required on delivery.”
settings.c2:
If your package arrives tampered, damaged, or opened:

  1. Do not accept the shipment.
  2. Take clear photos of the outer package and shipping label.
  3. Contact support immediately:
    Phone/WhatsApp: +91 6362348468 / +91 9620237728
    Email: care@lagorii.com

settings.step2: Place your order; we process items and ship once all are ready.
settings.step3: Track your parcel; details are shared when it leaves our warehouse.
settings.step4: On delivery, inspect the parcel. If tampered, follow the steps above.
settings.step5: For international orders, customs/duty may be applicable.
